ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "noc_code" TEXT /* NOC code representing the National Olympic Committee */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "olympic_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Olympic event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the event took place */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the event (Summer/Winter) */,
  "host_city" TEXT /* City where the event was hosted */,
  "opening_ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the opening ceremony */,
  "closing_ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the closing ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medals" (
  "medal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medal record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country that won the medals */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event in which the medals were won */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Count of gold medals won */,
  "silver" INTEGER /* Count of silver medals won */,
  "bronze" INTEGER /* Count of bronze medals won */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total medals won (gold + silver + bronze) */,
  "rank_by_total" INTEGER /* Rank of the country based on total medals won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medals_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medals_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES olympic_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "discipline" TEXT /* Discipline the sport belongs to (e.g., team, individual) */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used in the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the athlete represents */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the athlete is participating in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event detail record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Olympic event */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related sport */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the event took place */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the event was held */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES olympic_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medal_types" (
  "medal_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medal type */,
  "medal_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the medal type (e.g., Gold, Silver, Bronze) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medal_awards" (
  "medal_award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medal award record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete who received the medal */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event in which the medal was awarded */,
  "medal_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of medal awarded */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the medal was awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medal_award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medal_awards_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medal_awards_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medal_awards_medal_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("medal_type_id") REFERENCES medal_types ("medal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "event_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event participant record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete participating in the event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event the athlete is participating in */,
  "participant_role" TEXT /* Role of the athlete in the event (e.g., competitor, coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "event_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event result record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event the result is for */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete who achieved the result */,
  "result_time" TEXT /* Time taken by the athlete to complete the event */,
  "result_score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the athlete in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)
